owner_operator_stated: West Willow Family Dental's own site names Dr. Anthony Brucci as the practice's dentist/owner at 300 S West St, Wheaton, IL — not 'Premier Dental Group Personal Corporation.' Third-party bio sources state Dr. Brucci 'joined the practice of Premier Dental Group' before the location became West Willow Family Dental, indicating a rebrand/successor at this street address.
notes: Record entity is 'PREMIER DENTAL GROUP PERSONAL CORPORATION,' phone (630) 665-3317. The address (300 S West St, Wheaton, IL 60187) matches exactly, but the current occupant per its own live website is 'West Willow Family Dental,' phone (630) 665-0650 — a different name and different phone. Search evidence indicates Dr. Anthony Brucci previously worked under the 'Premier Dental Group' name at this location before it rebranded to West Willow Family Dental. Vendor hint domain (Centraldupageortho.com) was not used — it is an unrelated orthodontics site and does not corroborate this record.

owner_operator_stated: Practice's own About page identifies Dr. Gregory S. McBeth, DDS as Owner/Principal Dentist of McBeth Dental Health of Wheaton.
notes: Address (949 W. Liberty Dr, Wheaton, IL 60187) and phone ((630) 668-6071) match the record exactly. No careers/hiring page found on the official site ('/meet-the-doctors/' and '/our-team/' both 404). Two additional associate dentists (Brambert, Grise) are reported by a third-party CareCredit doctor-locator listing but were not independently confirmed on the practice's own pages checked.

owner_operator_stated: Site's Meet the Team page names Dr. Evelyn Maggos as Owner/Founding Dentist. The legal entity 'Pavnica & Maggos, P.C.' is named for the late founding dentist Dr. Stephanie Pavnica (1961-2019) and Dr. Maggos, who is the NPI record's authorized official; the practice does business as Park Dental Care.
notes: Vendor hint domain (Myparkdentalcare.com) confirmed correct — it is the DBA site of the legal entity Pavnica & Maggos, P.C. Address (26W276 Geneva Rd Ste E, Carol Stream, IL 60188) and phone ((630) 510-7800) match the record exactly. No careers/hiring page found in site navigation (Home, Our Culture, Meet the Team, Our Services, Patient Center, Blog, Connect with Us).

Practice name and address (341 E. Geneva Rd, Carol Stream, IL 60188) match the record exactly. Website-listed phone ((630) 588-0003) differs from the record's phone ((630) 665-7350); treated as a phone-data discrepancy rather than a successor conflict since the exact name and street address both corroborate the same single practice (address match alone is sufficient per the corroboration rule). The career page's application email uses domain tworiversdental.com, which may indicate an affiliated administrative/staffing service, but the site itself presents Simply Dental as a single independent Carol Stream location with no other stated corporate affiliation.

owner_operator_stated: Current occupant of 503 Thornhill Dr, Suite A, Carol Stream (phone (630) 653-0020) is 'Smile Obsession,' with Dr. Karyn Swade and Dr. Selam Totonchi listed as the practice's dentists — not 'Glenn S Schweitzer DDS PC.' Intermediate evidence shows the same address/phone was previously operated as 'K & L Family Dental' (Dr. Swade and a 'Dr. Riccolo'), and the vendor-hint-adjacent domain klfamilydental.com now 301-redirects to smileobsession.com, indicating a successive rebrand chain: Schweitzer -> K & L Family Dental -> Smile Obsession.
notes: Record entity is 'GLENN S SCHWEITZER DDS PC,' phone (630) 653-0020. Address (503 Thornhill Dr, Carol Stream, IL 60188) and phone match the current occupant exactly, but that occupant is 'Smile Obsession' (formerly 'K & L Family Dental'), not Glenn Schweitzer — classic successor/rebrand per the ownership-conflict rule. Smile Obsession's site references multiple city locations ('dentist-near-me' pages), suggesting it is a small multi-location group, not a single-office independent practice. A careers page link (https://smileobsession.com/careers/) exists in site navigation but was not fetched/verified for current openings, so openings[] is left empty.

Address (722 S President St, Wheaton, IL 60189) and phone ((630) 469-7696) match the record exactly, and the record's practice_name 'Dpd Smiles' already matches the site's current branding. The old vendor-hint domain (Dupagepediatricdentistry.com) is dead/parked, redirecting to a domain-for-sale (HugeDomains) page — DPD Smiles is the rebrand of the former 'DuPage Pediatric Dentistry.' Site indicates DPD Smiles operates two locations (Wheaton and St. Charles, IL) — a small multi-location group, not a single independent office. Full provider roster shown is 6 (adds two anesthesiologists, Dr. Chan and Tatyana Strong, MD, not counted in provider_count_website since they are not dentists). No careers/hiring page found.
